headline: GigaGloud Technology and Vulcan Materials have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: GigaCloud Technology's surge in revenue and earnings momentum lifts its outlook, while Vulcan Materials faces slowing construction demand, an earnings miss and valuation concerns.

raw.headline: GigaGloud Technology and Vulcan Materials have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day

headline: Bear of the Day: Vulcan Materials (VMC)
summary: It may be best to avoid Vulcan Materials (VMC) stock amid slowing demand for construction aggregates.

raw.headline: Bear of the Day: Vulcan Materials (VMC)
raw.summary: It may be best to avoid Vulcan Materials (VMC) stock amid slowing demand for construction aggregates.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Vulcan Materials (VMC) Ambitious EBITDA Targets And Tech-Driven Efficiency Push
summary: In March 2026, Vulcan Materials held its Investor Day, updating shareholders on new cash gross profit per ton and earnings targets, a multi‑billion‑dollar EBITDA ambition, and plans to use innovation and technology to improve profitability and growth in its aggregates-led business. The event offered a detailed look at how management aims to address recent margin pressures and competitive headwinds by emphasizing operational efficiency, technology adoption, and environmental and...
